data.title: Materialise reports Q4 results
data.description:
• Materialise press release (NASDAQ:MTLS): Q4 GAAP EPS of kEUR0.05
  • Revenue of kEUR65.68M (+0.6% Y/Y).
  • Total deferred revenues from software maintenance and license fees increased by 5,878 kEUR this quarter to 46,948 kEUR.
  • Adjusted EBITDA amounted to 4,306 kEUR for the fourth quarter of 2024 compared to 8,474 kEUR for the corresponding 2023 period. Adjusted EBIT amounted to (1,195) kEUR for the fourth quarter of 2024 compared to 3,154 kEUR for the 2023 period.

data.title: Freshpet misses top-line and bottom-line estimates; initiates FY25 and reaffirms FY27 outlook
data.description:
• Freshpet press release (NASDAQ:FRPT): Q4 GAAP EPS of $0.36 misses by $0.02.
  • Revenue of $262.7M (+22.0% Y/Y) misses by $1.27M.
  • Adjusted Gross Margin of 48.1%, compared to the prior year period of 41.1%.
  • Adjusted EBITDA of $52.6 million, compared to the prior year period of $31.3 million.

  • Outlook

    For full year 2025, the Company is providing the following guidance:

    • Net sales in the range of $1.18 billion to $1.21 billion, an increase of 21% to 24% from 2024 vs. $1.22B consensus;
    • Adjusted EBITDA of at least $210 million; and
    • Capital expenditures of ~$250 million.

    The Company is also updating its long-term guidance. For full year 2027, the Company now expects:

    • Net sales of $1.8 billion, unchanged vs. $1.82B consensus;
    • Adjusted Gross Margin of 48%, compared to 45% previously; and
    • Adjusted EBITDA margin of 22%, compared to 18% previously.

data.title: Alibaba in charts: Taobao and Tmall Group revenue up 37.5% Q/Q and 5.4% Y/Y in FQ3
CenterPoint Non-GAAP EPS of $0.40 in-line
data.description:
• CenterPoint press release (NYSE:CNP): Q4 Consolidated income of $248M
  • Non-GAAP EPS of $0.40 in-line.
  • Reiterated 2025 non-GAAP EPS guidance range of $1.74-$1.76, which, at the midpoint, represents 8% growth over full-year 2024 non-GAAP EPS and further maintains non-GAAP EPS growth target of mid-to-high end of 6%-8% annually thereafter through 20301

data.title: Utz Brands gives mixed Q4 results
data.description:
• Utz Brands press release (NYSE:UTZ): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.22 beats by $0.03.
  • Revenue of $341M (-3.2% Y/Y) misses by $8.93M.
  • Organic Net Sales flat; Branded Salty Snacks increased 2.9%
  • Gross Profit Margin expansion of 230bps
  • Adjusted Gross Profit Margin expansion of 230bps
  • Net Income of $2.1 million
  • Adjusted EBITDA increased 7.5% to $53.1 million
  • Adjusted Net Income increased 41.5% to $32.4 million
  • Diluted Earnings Per Share of $0.03
  • Adjusted Earnings Per Share increased 37.5% to $0.22

data.title: Perimeter Solutions GAAP EPS of $0.90, revenue of $86.2M
data.description:
• Perimeter Solutions press release (NYSE:PRM): Q4 GAAP EPS of $0.90.
  • Revenue of $86.2M (+44.9% Y/Y).

data.title: Earnings Snapshot: Alibaba tops FQ3 expectations; Free cash flow plunges 31% Y/Y
Ivanhoe Mines GAAP EPS of $0.17, revenue of $40.82M; initiates FY25 outlook
data.description:
• Ivanhoe Mines press release (OTCQX:IVPAF): FY GAAP EPS of $0.17.
  • Revenue of $40.82M.
  • Ivanhoe Mines reports record $625M adjusted EBITDA in 2024, up from $604M in 2023.
  • Kamoa-Kakula delivers record copper production of 437,061 tonnes in 2024, including 133,819 tonnes in Q4.
  • Kamoa-Kakula maintains competitive cost structure: $1.71/lb Cost of Sales, $1.65/lb. cash cost (C1), meeting guidance for fourth consecutive year.
  • The Kamoa-Kakula Copper Complex sold 396,972 tonnes of payable copper in 2024 realizing revenue of $3,107 million for the Kamoa Holding joint venture, compared to 375,779 tonnes of payable copper sold for revenue of $2,704 million for the same period in 2023.
  • Outlook:
  • Kamoa-Kakula’s 2025 production guidance has been set at 520,000 to 580,000 tonnes of copper in concentrate. Kamoa-Kakula is targeting a production rate of approximately 600,000 tonnes of copper in concentrate for 2026, following the completion of power initiatives currently underway, together with optimization projects for improved Phase 1 and 2 recoveries (“Project 95”) and increased Phase 3 throughput underway.
    • Construction of Kamoa-Kakula’s 500,000-tonne-per-annum on-site, direct-to-blister copper smelter, the largest in Africa, is now complete. The ramp-up of the smelter complex has been deferred by up to three months due to power availability and is expected to commence in Q2 2025 and will drive improvement in margins.

data.title: Cascades Non-GAAP EPS of $0.25, revenue of $1.21B beats by $382.04M
data.description:
• Cascades press release (OTCPK:CADNF): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.25.
  • Revenue of $1.21B (+6.1% Y/Y) beats by $382.04M.
  • Operating income of $16 million (compared with operating income of $36 million in Q3 2024 and operating loss of $(24) million in Q4 2023);
  • Net loss per common share of ($0.13) (compared with net earnings per common share of $0.01 in Q3 2024 and a net loss per common share of ($0.57) in Q4 2023);
